description_en: The REQ is the official Quebec business registry. All businesses operating in Quebec must register here to obtain a NEQ (Quebec Enterprise Number).
description_fr: Le REQ est le registre officiel des entreprises au Québec. Toutes les entreprises doivent s'y inscrire pour obtenir un NEQ.

NEQ.description_en: Numéro d'entreprise du Québec — your 10-digit Quebec business identifier

fees_2026.note: Fees subject to change — verify at REQ website

processing_time_en: Online registration is typically immediate for sole proprietorships. Corporations may take 1–3 business days.
documents_required_en: Business name (if using a name other than your own)
